title: Meat flower
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Meat flowers''' were carnivorous [[Plant/Legends|plants]] native to [[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]]. A meat flower would bite if touched, but would stop once it had its fill, though the rare larger flowers could devour an adult [[Human/Legends|Human]]. However, the juice of meat flower leaves could also soothe the bites the flowers themselves delivered.

During his brief sojourn on Dagobah, [[Zak Arranda/Legends|Zak Arranda]] received a meat flower from [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]]. Zak later used the flower to distract a member of the cannibalistic [[The Children|Children]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Galaxy of Fear: The Hunger]]'' {{1st}}
